title: Richard Lewis
compiled_truth: Richard Lewis is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-22 to 2002-01-14), Richard Lewis sent 12 and received 352 emails, totalling 364 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (5), [Dale Surbey](people/dale-surbey) (3), [Simon Hastings](people/simon-hastings) (3), [John Sherriff](people/john-sherriff) (3), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (3). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, natsource.
